name: Can I sue nationwide for AI referral malpractice from a NY firm?
description: Yes, sue where harmed; NY AI rules influential.[8][9]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue nationwide for AI referral malpractice from a NY firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue where harmed; NY AI rules influential.[8][9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if harm occurred in your state or firm solicited there; choice of law applies. NY courts lead on AI sanctions.[8][9] Factors: jurisdiction where contract formed, federal diversity. Multi-state firms common.[2] Hire local counsel for venue.
